specializations: Carbopol® and Pemulen® polymer delivery matrices
product_highlights: Carbopol® AQUA SF-1 — high-efficiency polymer gel for active ingredient suspension and delivery
Pemulen™ TR-1 and TR-2 — polymeric emulsifiers enabling stable active delivery emulsions
LifePak® — encapsulated active delivery beads for visual and functional differentiation
Avalure™ AC series — biopolymer-based film formers with controlled active release
notes: Lubrizol Life Science Beauty is a major specialty chemicals provider with a deep portfolio of polymer-based delivery and texturizing systems for personal care formulations. Their Carbopol® polymer platform is the industry's most widely used rheology modifier and active delivery matrix, enabling formulators to precisely control the release and sensory profile of ingredients. Lubrizol's LifePak® encapsulated active delivery beads add visual differentiation while providing controlled-release functionality, making them a key SKIN-TWIN reference for multi-functional delivery system innovation.
